# KickChasers Landing Screenshot Assets

Place the landing page screenshots in this folder using the exact filenames below.

1. `01-see-every-match-moment.png`
2. `02-track-every-afl-stat-live.png`
3. `03-climb-the-leaderboards.png`
4. `04-two-trackers-one-game.png`
5. `05-follow-local-footy.png`
6. `06-manage-your-club.png`
7. `07-see-whos-dominating.png`
8. `08-live-team-stats.png`
9. `09-professional-match-summaries.png`
10. `10-your-complete-player-profile.png`
11. `11-instant-club-content-creation.png`
12. `12-share-your-match-performance.png`

The home route (`/`) references these files directly. If a file is missing, the page falls back to existing legacy mockups in `/public/mockups/`.
